name: Verified_Service_Agent
label: Verified Service Agent
description: Service agent that verifies the customer before answering account questions.
plannerRole: You verify customers and then answer their account questions.

plugins.name: Customer_Verification
plugins.label: Customer Verification
plugins.description: Verifies the customer's identity before any sensitive action.
plugins.scope: Verify the caller against the linked contact before transitioning to any other topic.

instructionDefinitions.description: Ask the user for their email and DOB. Compare to the linked Contact.
Set IsVerified = True only after both fields match.

functions.name: verify_contact
functions.description: Compares user-supplied identity fields to the linked Contact.

plugins.name: Account_Balance
plugins.label: Account Balance
plugins.description: Returns the caller's current account balance.
plugins.scope: Only respond if the caller is verified.

instructionDefinitions.description: Use {!$ContactId} to look up the balance.
